answers: Digital nomad = working remotely while traveling. Need: laptop, reliable income, and travel-friendly lifestyle.
Tips: have stable income first, get travel insurance, use coworking spaces, manage time zones, and budget carefully.
Popular destinations: Bali, Chiang Mai, Lisbon, Medellín, and Tbilisi — affordable, good WiFi, and nomad communities.
Digital nomad ki: laptop niye ghure ghure kaj kora. Remote job thakle, anywhere boshei kaj kora jay.

feelings.question: digital nomad lifestyle ki?
feelings.answer: Digital nomads need a reliable income, travel-friendly lifestyle, and the ability to work remotely while traveling.
